series_metadata.series_description: A report that is developed after a series of assessments given by the school psychologist and others to determine whether or not the student has a disability

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: 6 years after student graduates or would have normally graduated. Inform parent or adult student before destruction. ; Electronic: 6 years after the student graduates or would have normally graduated. Inform parent or adult student before destruction., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
